steps.title: Set up slope formula with the intercept points
steps.content:
The slope formula is $m = \frac{y_2 - y_1}{x_2 - x_1}$. We have two points: the x-intercept $(-4, 0)$ and the y-intercept $(0, \frac{86}{3})$.

Substituting into the formula:
$$m = \frac{\frac{86}{3} - 0}{0 - (-4)} = \frac{\frac{86}{3}}{4}$$

steps.title: Simplify the complex fraction
steps.content:
Dividing by 4 is the same as multiplying by $\frac{1}{4}$:
$$m = \frac{86}{3} \cdot \frac{1}{4} = \frac{86}{12}$$
Reduce by dividing both numerator and denominator by their GCD of 2:
$$m = \frac{43}{6}$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
